configure.title: Configure
configure.description: Add the code snippet to your bot

finished.title: Finished
finished.description: You're ready to use Discord Analytics

botLimitReached.title: Bot limit reached
botLimitReached.description: You reached the bot limit of your account. Please contact an administrator to increase it.

stepOne.subtitle: You're 5 minutes away from your stats. To get started, we'll need your bot's ID.
stepOne.acceptTosDescription: By submitting this form, you agree with our

getToken.heading: 1. Get your token
getToken.description: This token allows your bot to interact with our API.

integrate.heading: 2. Integrate into your code
integrate.description: Now you'll have to integrate a client into your bot's code. Select your library:

install.addCodeHeading: b. Add Discord Analytics to your code
install.startBotDescription: In order to start your bot with Discord Analytics, you need to add the NODE_ENV to you environment variables

erisWarning.title: Compatibility warning
erisWarning.description: Due to the lack of update of Eris, some of the features of Discord Analytics might not be available.

moreExamples.title: More examples
moreExamples.description: Check out our documentation for more examples and details about how to install Discord Analytics.

stillNothing.title: Still nothing?
stillNothing.description: Maybe you should check your console or your configuration

stepThree.waitingForLoginDescription: We're waiting for your bot to login. If you still see this page after a minute, check the console for potential errors.
stepThree.waitingForStatsDescription: Now your bot is logged in, we'll start collecting stats for you. If you still see this page after a minute, check the console for potential errors.

stepFour.title: You did it!
stepFour.description: Discord Analytics is now configured on your Discord bot. Go check the dashboard to see all the stats you can get
